Response.title: Form Response
Response.description: A response from a doctor interested in Anzarseha AI services.

pain.description: The primary administrative pain point identified.

demoChoice.description: The specific AI use case chosen for the demo.

contactInfo.description: The doctor's contact information (WhatsApp or Email).

submittedAt.description: The timestamp when the response was submitted.

Session.title: User Session
Session.description: A record of a user's journey through the form, grouping all clicks.

sessionId.description: Unique ID for the user session.

events.description: List of click events in this session.

contactInfo.description: The final contact info submitted by the user.

/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Collection of user sessions with grouped clicks.
